term: I Know It When I See It
pronunciation: /aɪ noʊ ɪt wɛn aɪ siː ɪt/
englishDefinitions: A way of saying something is hard to define exactly, but easy to recognize.
persianTranslation: تعریف دقیق ندارد ولی با دیدن معلوم می‌شود
examples: Beauty is hard to define, but I know it when I see it.
The judge said, 'I know it when I see it,' about the artwork.
Some people use this phrase when a clear definition is impossible.
